permits.description: Interior renovations in select areas only. New ceiling, floor & wall finishes, built-in cabinetry, plumbing fixtures, appliances per plan. New basement stair. New interior walls & wall openings per plan. Existing heating & cooling to be replaced. Existing electrical wiring to replaced in select areas w/ new light fixtures. New hardwired, interconnected smoke & CO system w/ battery backup to be installed per code requirements. New insulation in roof & select exterior walls.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($426,500); keyword: renovation; minor: insulation; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The major renovation was initiated immediately after the 2023 purchase by the owner-occupant, indicating a personal move-in renovation rather than a flip or pre-sale preparation.
